chatter: How I long to sink my teeth into them...
Let ambition's flame burn, and starve the enemy of breath.
Respect my command, and we'll have no quarrel.
Screw your courage to its place, and you will serve me well.
Steel yourselves, and we'll all leave with our lives.
Strike without mercy, and victory will be ours!
The battle is almost upon us. Magnifico.
You are nothing without my strength.
Cut to the very heart of them!
Make a feast of their failure!
Victory is a choice. Make it.
Enough of this. Bring them down!
Fix yourselves! I will not accept a loss.
Last chance. Prove yourselves to me.
The final round is here. Don't fail me.
*snarl* Now they owe me their life.
You'll pay for such betrayal, Vaira. (eliminated by Domina )
For this, you will be rewarded.
Oh, I'll leave them in pieces!
I have more to fight for.
I am the avatar of triumph!
call-outs: A little longer, and we will triumph!
It's almost through. Stand your ground!
Victory is almost ours. Hold your defense!
Our time runs short. Don't hold back!
This is the final moment. Strike now!
eliminations: A wound even you cannot mend. (eliminating any Support hero)
And you were the best they had. (eliminating Ana , Freja , Reinhardt , Soldier: 76 , or Torbjörn )
I don't leave loose ends. (eliminating Baptiste )
Your era is over , Akande! (eliminating Doomfist )
If you aim to kill me, at least bare your fangs. (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
Soft shelled and weak willed. (eliminating Mizuki )
The guilty are never spared. (eliminating Reaper )
Come close and face me, coward. (long-range elimination)
No one stands in my way!
You put on a good show. (eliminating any enemy using ultimate ability)
Drop the letter opener, amateur. (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
You're no swordsman. (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
There is no will I cannot break! (eliminating Moira using Coalescence)
You cannot escape consequence! (eliminating airborne Reaper )
How craven of you. (eliminating Sombra using stealth)
I stand alone against giants! (eliminating any large hero as last person alive on team)
Down where you belong. (eliminating airborne enemy)
You look better on the ground. (eliminating airborne enemy)
I am above all! (eliminating an airborne enemy while airborne)
I outpace you. (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
All who stand in my path shall fall!
I will raze every one of you!
Let us revel in their failure.
My name is no empty threat.
Revenge is my birthright. (eliminating Talon member)
I say when you can die.
You have more left to give me.
There is no pit deeper than failure.
Wings won't save you from my blade!
I've brought their turret to ruin.
The enemy turret is done for.
You impress me, healer. (to any Support, excluding Moira )
So you can win a fight. (to Doomfist )
I should have you on retainer. (to Freja )
interactions: Baptiste : I see you're making some changes in Talon... any chance that includes forgetting about me? Vendetta : I owe you no favors, least of all your life. Baptiste : Is it a favor, or less work for a very busy woman? Vendetta : Executing traitors isn't work. It's pleasure.

Cassidy : I know my regrets ain't gonna bring him back, but... I am sorry about how things went down with your father . Vendetta : Don't be. You played your part in his downfall better than he could have foreseen.
Vendetta : You parade around like some righteous outlaw, and yet I doubt you could even throw a lasso. Cassidy : If it meant I'd catch you on the other end, I wager I'd aim it just right.
Cassidy : Your father was a bad man, but he wasn't a tyrant. This ain't what he would've wanted. Vendetta : If you think my ambitions end at my father's wants, you're more fool than you look.

D.Va : Do you really call yourself a "mech slayer"? Hehe. Vendetta : I don't call myself one. I am one. Your squad must be overdue for a demonstration. D.Va : Try it! Tokki and I love crushing sweats. Overlord 's got our back! You'd never take us down. *scoffs* Are you serious? Casino would fly circles around you! With King on our team, you don't stand a chance! Ha! No way! D.Mon 's way better with a sword than you!

Domina : You're quite a skilled negotiator, Marzia. I'm impressed. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Domina : Of course. Still rather rugged, though, aren't you? Vendetta : That, I should hope, is readily apparent.

Doomfist : Reclaiming your father 's empire will not be so simple. Vendetta : My plans go far beyond what my father could have ever achieved. Doomfist : Let's see how far that ambition carries you. Vendetta : I'll make sure you have a front row seat.
Emre : Didn't expect this winning smile, did you? *sigh* Max always undersells my looks. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Emre : *chuckle* I get that a lot, too.

Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Freja : It looks that way. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] (one of two): Emre : We're a package deal, V. If you want me, you put your trust in her. Freja : Keep paying my price, and it's a sign of whatever you'd like.

Vendetta : So this is how the last son of Shimada wields his legacy? Skulking about like a... "fannullone". Hanzo : The Hashimoto cannot go unchanged. It is my duty to protect my home from tyrants like you. Vendetta : *laughs* Call it tyranny if you like. At least my victory is absolute.

Juno : You have performed in the Colosseo ? I have always wanted to see the Circuit Maximus steeds up close... Vendetta : They have weak points, as does every opponent. Juno : You don't mean... you have destroyed one before? Vendetta : Stay out of the Colosseo , girl. You wouldn't have the stomach for it.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Vendetta : La Lupa. For her strength and her glory. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it.

Mauga : I gotta say, I'm lovin' all the changes lately, boss! *chuckles* Doomfist was always on my back about 'exercising restraint', or whatever. Vendetta : [VOICE LINE NOT IN-GAME] Mauga : *laughter* You don't gotta tell me twice!
Vendetta : Allying with Doomfist truly was the beginning of your failure. Ramattra : Failure is only a threat to those who see a single path.

Vendetta : You did me a favor by calling your retreat, omnic. It saved me the trouble of killing you myself. Ramattra : Of course. I will gladly stand aside while you goad humanity to tear itself apart.
Reaper : "The Wolf of Retribution." *scoffs* And people say I'm dramatic. Vendetta : Don't test my fangs, "Gabriel Reyes." You'll end up bloody.
Vendetta : I hope you've made your funeral arrangements. You never know which fight will be your last. Reaper : They won't take me down out there. Vendetta : I should hope not. That honor is mine.

Vendetta : You ran when you killed my father! You ran from Overwatch , and now... you run from Talon . It seems cowardice is all you know. Reaper : Call it what you want. It'll keep me alive long enough to kill you someday.

Vendetta : Had you remained with Talon , I might have stayed your execution. Reaper : *grunt* Vendetta : Then again... perhaps your judgement was already overdue. Reaper : If you've got a point, make it. Vendetta : Never. This is far more entertaining.

Reaper : I thought you'd know better than Talon to kill Doomfist , since you never shut up about 'retribution'. Vendetta : Your failed leader was already bleeding allies, and what few remain can be swiftly put down.

Vendetta : Fail me, vecchio sciocco, and you'll find I'm less tolerant than my predecessor . Sigma : Ah, but is failure not an opportunity to reconsider our variables? Vendetta : Make no mistake: you are the variable here, and I would eliminate you without hesitation.
Sojourn : This war you're waging isn't just aimless chaos. What are you planning? Vendetta : Have patience, Commander. I would never spoil the finale.
Sombra : Of course I left. You're burning the world down! Vendetta : Flee, then. May you waste your life outrunning your regret.

Vendetta : I'm disappointed you left Talon behind, Amélie. You would have thrived under my rule. Widowmaker : I've given my life to Talon. I have no desire to serve another's vengeance. Vendetta : Mine was not the only revenge I would have chased. A shame you forfeited your chance to hunt by my side.
Vendetta : Glad to have you with me, Lacroix. You don't drag behind like the rest. Widowmaker : Do I look like I need your praise? Vendetta : No. And that's exactly why you've earned it.

Vendetta : Come face me in the Colosseo, "Champion." Prove you're more than just prey. Wrecking Ball : The hamster prefers a real challenge. Vendetta : Fine, "damnatio ad bestias" it is. My wolves will love the chase.
map-specific: And so we have arrived at the seat of my power.
I always knew I'd grow beyond this city.
So this is what Overwatch calls a stronghold. How meager.
